TextView.android:text:
The hardest part of any journey is simply beginning, but every workout is an investment in your future self.
You don’t need the perfect plan or hours of free time to make an impact; you just need the willingness to move.
Whether it’s a high-energy session or a quick stretch, physical activity sharpens your mind and builds the discipline necessary to tackle any challenge.
Push past the initial resistance, focus on your form, and let the momentum of your first few minutes carry you through.
Your body was made to move—get started today.
